shortDescription: Read with bold emphasis on key words so text is easier to scan and understand. Paste or import text, adjust the bolding strength, and read at your own pace.
longDescription:
Bold Reading transforms plain text into a clearer, more focused reading experience by emphasising the most important parts of each word.

Paste or import the text you want to read, tune how strongly words are bolded to suit your eyes, and work through the content at a pace that feels comfortable. Designed to reduce visual noise and help you stay with the line.

Simple controls, a distraction-free layout, and settings you can adjust as you go—whether you are reading articles, notes, or long-form text on your iPhone or iPad.
